song.title: The Wonderful Cross
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) When I survey the wondrous cross on which the Prince of Glory died, My richest gain I count but loss, and pour contempt on all my pride.
[V2] 2) See from His head, His hands, His feet, Sorrow and love flow mingled down; Did e’er such love and sorrow meet, Or thorns compose so rich a crown?
[C] Chorus O the wonderful cross, O the wonderful cross Bids me come and die And find that I may truly live|| O the wonderful cross, O the wonderful cross All who gather here by grace Draw near and bless Your name
[V3] 3) Were the whole realm of nature mine, that were an off’ring far too small, Love so amazing so divine, demands my soul, my life, my all.
song.author: Isaac Watts
